verses.text: “Tu-in hihte pen amaute' tungah na piak ding biakna ngeina kipte ahi hi
Hebru mi sila khat na lei uh ciangin, amah in kum guk sung na hong sepsak ding a, a kum sagihna ciangin bangmah hong pia loin a suakta-in paikhia ding hi
Amah guakin hong pai ahih leh amah guak mahin paikhia ding a, zi neisa-in hong pai ahih leh amah tawh a zi zong paikhia ding hi
A topa in amah zi guan a, tuanu in amah tawh tapate ahi a, tanute ahi zongin a neih leh, a zi leh a tate pen a topa-a' hi ding a, amah guakin paikhia ding hi
Ahih hangin sila in a kitel takin genin, ‘Ka topa, ka zi, leh ka tate ka it hi; a suakta-in ka paikhia kei ding hi,’ a cih leh

tua ciangin a topa in thukhente kiangah amah paipih ding hi. Amah in kongkhakah ahi a, kongkhak khuamah ahi zongin amah paipih ding hi. A topa in phimpi khat tawh ama bil vuhsak ding a, amah in a nuntak tawntung ama na sepsak ding hi
“Mi khat in a tanu sila-in a zuak ciangin, tuanu pen sila pasalte bangin paikhialo ding hi

A topa in ama zi dingin a sehsa tua numei in amah a lungkimsak kei leh, amah in tuanu a pa kiang mahah zuakkik ding hi. Amah, tuanu tungah citakin gamtalo ahih manin, gamdang mi khat tungah tuanu a zuak theihna ding thu neilo ding hi
Mi khat in a tapa-a' dingin sila numei a lei leh, amah in tanu bangin tuanu bawl ding hi
Amah in zi dang khat a lakthuah leh, a zi masa' annek, a puansilh, ahih kei leh lupkhopna ding thuneihna khiamlo ding hi
Amah in hih thu thumte tuanu-a' dingin a bawl kei leh, sum hong piak kullo, bangmah a kulloin tuanu paikhia thei ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Ngongtatna a om ciangin Zuih ding Thute

verses.text: “Mi khat satin a sisak mi peuhpeuh kithat ding hi
Ahih hangin amah in a thah sawm hilo a, a thah khak ahih leh, amah a tai theihna dingin note-a' ding mun khat ka seh ding hi
Ahih hangin mi khat in midang khat thah ding tumin a thah leh, amah na thah theihna dingun note in ka biakna tau a belhna nangawn panin amah na la teitei ding uh hi
“Ama pa hita leh ama nu hita leh a sat peuhmah kithat ding hi
“Zuak ding ahi a, sila-in neih ding ahi zongin mi a gu mi peuhmah kithat ding hi
“Ama pa hita leh ama nu hita leh a samsia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi
“Mite kitawng a, a khat in adang khat suangtum khat tawh ahi a, ama khuttum tawh ahi zongin tumin, mipa a sihloh hangin lupna ngakin
tua ciangin mipa thozo-in ama ciangkhut tawh a vakkhiatkik zawh nak leh, amah a tumpa siang ding hi. Amah in ama hun bei sungteng tangding bek ama tungah loh ding a, amah damsiangsak ding hi
“Mi khat in molhtum khat tawh ama sila ahi pasal hita leh numei hita leh satin a phualah a sih pah leh, amah gim kipia ding hi
Ahih hangin ni khat ahi a, ni nih ahi zongin sila a nuntak leh, amah gim piak ding hilo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sila pen ama neihsa ahih manin sila a sih ciangin amah a sumh khin ahi hi

“Mite kitawngin numei naupaii khat liamsak a, tatolhin; ahi zongin siatna in a zuihbeh kei nak leh, tuanu' pasal in ama tunga a cihzah tawh kituakin tua numei a liamsak mi kigam ding a, thukhente' khenna bangin amah liau ding hi
Siatna khatpeuh in a zuihbeh leh, tua ciangin nuntakna tangding nuntakna
mit tangding mit, ha tangding ha, khut tangding khut, khe tangding khe
meikang tangding meikang, liamna tangding liamna, siatna tangding siatna pia ding hi
“Mi khat in ama sila ahi pasal hita leh numei hita leh a mit satin a suksiatkhak leh amah in tua mit' hangin sila suakta sakin paikhiasak ding hi
Amah in a sila ahi pasal hita leh numei hita leh a ha a tupkhiat leh, amah in tua ha' hangin sila suakta sakin paikhiasak ding hi.
“Bawngtal khat in pasal hita leh numei hita leh a ki tawh a piklup ciangin, a bawngtal kidenglum ding a, a sa kinelo ding hi. Ahih hangin bawngtal neipa siang ding hi

Ahih hangin a hun beisa-ah bawngtal in mi si thei a, a neipa kihilh napi-in a khumcip kei a, tua bawngtal in pasal ahi a, numei ahi zongin a thah leh, bawngtal kidenglum ding a, a neipa zong kithat ding hi
Ama tung pan tatkhiatna sum a kinget leh, ama nuntakna tatkhiatna dingin ama tungah a kingen zahzah amah in pia ding hi
Tua bawngtal in mi' tapa ahi a, tanu ahi zongin a ki tawh a pik leh hih ngeina tawh kizui-in kigamta ding hi
Bawngtal in sila ahi pasal hita leh numei hita leh khat peuhpeuh a ki tawh a pik leh, a neipa in amau' topa' tungah ngun shekel sawmthum pia ding a, bawngtal kidenglum ding hi
“Mi khat in dum hon'sa-in a nusia ahi a, mi khat in dum a tawh ciangin sin loin om ahi zongin, bawngtal hita leh la hita leh dum sungah a kiat leh
dum neipa in loh ding hi. Amah in a neipa tungah sum pia ding a, ganhing luang pen ama-a' hi pah ding hi
“Mi khat' bawngtal in adang khat' bawngtal liamsakin a sih leh, amaute in a hing pen zuak ding uh a, tua man hawm ding uh hi. A ganhing si pen zong amaute in hawm ding uh hi
Tua bang hilo a, bawngtal in mi si ngei hi, ci-in kithei napi a neipa in a khumcip kei leh, amah in bawngtal tangding bawngtal pia ding a, a si ganhing pen amah in tang ding hi.
